family_summaries.lesson: Dense cyclotomic GCD decoding recovers shifts without candidate enumeration, but its degree grows with p; the remaining question is a decoding-time lower bound, not query evidence.
Dense cyclotomic GCD decoding recovers shifts without candidate enumeration, but its degree grows with p; the remaining question is a decoding-time lower bound, not query evidence.
